{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211803438D32618C05DDEBFACDDE"}"},"total":62},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612972615658160958","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看 虽然前面跟师兄的交集描写让人觉得有一些过于粘腻 但是后面就觉得这种拉扯很厉害 文笔很好 诗句插杂在其中 伏笔很多  作者大大一定不要烂尾呀"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772536479,"group_id":"7575831372523129880","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"天地不仁 以万物为刍狗","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+GrzZJqlWn2jL92U47n7k23DEys/xbXZrBwOUXOaYpc","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/38d39dec1a674c0ba703f024e51d59b4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622382&x-signature=7ijUyQuL2NOIgU%2BLsDE%2B0IZbDZs%3D","user_id":"2749240887753741","user_name":"一小颗粒子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2749240887753741","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575831372523129880","book_info":{"abstract":"【厌世疯批剑修小师妹×患得患失病弱师兄】
把宁澄无骗来修仙的垃圾系统许了她三个愿望，无论她想要什么，它都会在力所能及的范围内替她实现。
宁澄无不假思索：我想要永远活下去，想要获得幸福，想要比这世上的任何人都要强大！
愿望让她获得了不死之身，待在师门众人身边的她也的确无忧无虑感到幸福，更别提彼时她已是这个世界里随手一剑便能将天斩开缝隙的传奇剑修。
然而宁澄无从未想过，轻易得来的力量终究会以各种残忍的方式失去，但幸好她从未失去过重新拥有一切勇气。
天才剑修的陨落？对于宁澄无来说，不过是多花点时间从负再走回零而已。
只是……
宁澄无：那些打不死我的——呜呜，怎么一直在打我啊！！QAQ
——
//仙侠，双洁1v1，he！！
//少量精神污染，有刀，轻猎奇重口","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9a1877a31fa64173cea0a329615e58f0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"追白鸟","author_id":"","book_id":"7575831372523129880","book_name":"仙师大人虽然有病但实在美丽","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0a890","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1003人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":248,"name":"玄幻言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=248&name=玄幻言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":868,"name":"剑修","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=868&name=剑修&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7575831669924446744","read_count":"1003","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"250539"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"101","tags":"玄幻言情,古代言情,异世穿越,系统,剑修,1v1,HE","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9a1877a31fa64173cea0a329615e58f0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779271423&x-signature=IFuUHPj1Xiz0nEClsEZqgHCgQGA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1366057810403668","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"123"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211803438D32618C05DDEBFACDDE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":173},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7589302820095820606","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看的一本书，作者把每一个人物写的都非常细腻，将主角之间的情与人生的理解混合在了一起，女主只是一个普通人但她又并不普通，她的内心充满着一往无前的勇气，即使身出平凡还心向正义，遇见不平之事会拔刀相助，不嫌弃任何一个人，最令我喜欢的是这本书表现的出的，虽然曾经我也少年轻狂过，认为自己天下第一，但是在经历过巨大的灾难后，虽疯狂了一段时日，\但最后还是恢复理智，纵使身出弱小，也一次次站起来。她是不死之身但她不是不会痛，我不知道她是如何熬过那两百，但我见到的她是强大的，不是实力的强大而是仍然拥有救她人的心，是那种只在内心的温柔。可能我的文笔不太好，但这真的是一本很好看的书。  
最后说一下女主是穿越的，有系统，男主是清冷白发异瞳师兄 ，她俩贼好嗑。","text_exts":[{"e":53,"s":50,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774087423EBFACDDE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227589302820095820606%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227575831372523129880%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767025824,"group_id":"7575831372523129880","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"嘻嘻","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7Q/8Ma8TKB+kHmXBYDFPIA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/963f03e22d704a63b49e3cdfd840660b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620405&x-signature=RMcYoV%2ByOGYA7sg2BjKMZMC%2BZJ8%3D","user_id":"361118681011967","user_name":"哦呦@"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"361118681011967","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575831372523129880","book_info":{"abstract":"【厌世疯批剑修小师妹×患得患失病弱师兄】
